allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3002/tools/publish_alert -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"level":"warning","zone":"A","message":"Test alert from CLI","rationale":"Testing alert system"}')
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{e[\\"id\\"]} -> type={e.get\(\\"type\\",\\"?\\"\)} lastModified={e.get\(\\"dateModified\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\) for e in data[:5]]")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path)

Bash(node -e "const fmt = require\('./src/telegram-formatter'\); console.log\(fmt.formatHelp\(\)\); console.log\('---'\); console.log\(fmt.formatRisk\({ zone: 'A', riskScore: 85, riskLevel: 'critical', rationale: 'High humidity + power overload', recommendedActions: ['CUT_POWER', 'ALERT_LAMP'], confidence: 0.92, reasoningSource: 'rules' }\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const sr = require\('./src/skill-router'\); console.log\('skill-router loaded, exports:', Object.keys\(sr\)\)")
